---
title: "Home"
---

## Machine Learning – Fundamentals for Non-techies

- [Neural Networks](ml-fundamentals/chapters/neural_networks.qmd)
- [Vectors](ml-fundamentals/chapters/vectors.qmd)
- [Classification](ml-fundamentals/chapters/vector_classification.qmd)

---

## Machine Learning – Learn through Coding

- [Python Setup](ml-coding/chapters/00-setup.ipynb)
- [Regression](ml-coding/chapters/01-regression.ipynb)
- [Vectors and Similarity](ml-coding/chapters/02-vectors.ipynb)
- [Classification with the Perceptron Algorithm](ml-coding/chapters/03-classification.ipynb)
- [Classification with the Perceptron Algorithm - Part 2](ml-coding/chapters/04-classification-02.ipynb)

---

## Applied ML

- [A simple measure to reduce LLM costs](applied-ml/chapters/agent-costs.qmd)
- [Is Package Software Dead?](applied-ml/chapters/is-package-software-dead.qmd)

---

<!--
## My Projects

- [Article](ml-projects/chapters/article.qmd)
-->
